title: Product Goals: Knowledge Tasks MVP
content: Primary: generate concise briefs from scattered notes. Secondary: turn notes into drafts. Supporting: review and clean up overlaps.

title: User Pain Points
content: Users have many short notes from meetings and research but lack a quick way to turn them into meeting briefs or drafts. They also accumulate duplicate notes over time.

title: Design: Deterministic Retrieval Pipeline
content: Use keyword search first, then optional multi-seed semantic expansion (top 2-3 seeds). Deduplicate with keyword precedence. Fixed, auditable flow.

title: Design: Tool Layer Reuse
content: All tasks should reuse agent tools: searchNotes, semanticSearchNotes, getNoteById, createNote. No direct SQL from the runner.

title: Mode Spec: Brief
content: Brief should return key updates, risks/blockers, and next steps. Keep it under 250 words and action-oriented.

title: Mode Spec: Writing
content: Writing transforms context into a draft with an optional title, an outline, and a draft body. The markdown should be readable.

title: Mode Spec: Review
content: Review focuses on maintenance: find likely duplicates, overlapping notes, and propose merge suggestions. Avoid claiming contradictions without evidence.

title: Weekly Update: Week 1
content: Completed tool layer scaffolding and search/semantic utilities. Risk: OpenAI quota in demos. Next: wire runner to UI and add provenance.

title: Blocking Issue: IPC Back-Compat
content: We must keep run-research working for earlier builds. Solution: map to brief mode under new knowledge task runner.

title: Decision: Brief is Primary
content: Prioritize Brief as the main job-to-be-done. Writing is secondary and Review is supportive. Emphasize this in UX copy and defaults.

title: Weekly Update: Week 2
content: Shipped Knowledge Tasks UI with mode selector and structured JSON blocks. Risk: dataset inconsistency during demos. Next: add local seed notes.

title: Overlap: Brief Spec (duplicate)
content: A brief should summarize progress, flag risks or blockers, and list next actions; aim for a meeting-ready one‑pager. (Paraphrase of earlier brief spec)

title: Overlap: Retrieval Pipeline Notes
content: Retrieval should start with keywords, optionally expand semantically from top seeds, and remain deterministic/auditable. (Paraphrase of pipeline design)

title: Deprioritized: Real-time Chat Agent
content: Cut scope: no multi-turn chat or planning. Focus on fixed-flow tasks grounded in local notes.

title: Deprioritized: Web Crawler
content: No web crawling for v1. Keep the system local-first with optional embeddings and simple AI summarization.

title: Writing: Cost Optimization Draft Cue
content: Draft guidance: turn cloud cost notes into a proposal with title, outline, and a concise body covering actions and impact.
